reference: I fell a week ago and banged up my knee. It swelled, and I applied ice throughout the day. The swelling went down, and my knee developed a reddish-purple bruise that ran down my leg to my foot. Now my foot is swollen and has a purple bruise on my instep, which is bumpy with raised spots on my ankle bone.
text: I fell a week ago and banged up my knee. It swelled, and I applied ice throughout the day. The swelling went down, and my knee developed a reddish-purple bruise that ran down my leg to my foot.
